I thoroughly recommend that you dine in the restaurant in Mitazaki JAK Hotel. It has an unusual menu. It serves a buffet breakfast and a breakfast with a choice of menu. It offers a buffer lunch and two set menus of four courses. For supper rhere are a buffet supper and a choice of menu (a menu of four courses). I ordered beef served with onion from the menu whereas my friend John chose a vegetable dish from it. The inside of the meat is raw while the outside is cooked. Onion can be eaten raw or cooked. The cafe in the hotel also has an excellent menu. I have a lunch reservation at the cafe for three people for twenty five to two next Tuesday.

國際線個機場真係好細 得兩個停機坪

I'm skiing with my Japanese friend Sumio in Fukuoka right now. He'll be giving a birthday party tomorrow but alas I can't attend as I got work to do. Sumio is making the most elaborate preparations for the party. My uncle asked "How are the party preparations going?" Alan is assisting with preparations for the party. Peter is also assisting in making the party preparations. They're sharing the preparation between them so it isn't too much work. Happy birthday Sumio. I'm sure your friends will join me in wishing you a very happy birthday. Last year he got a massage chair for my birthday. I remember I said "I cna't believe you got me a massage chair" It didn't come cheap. Amy has received a commission for an article on Picasso from an art magazine. He's doing research in preparation of the party. Her boyfriend is also assisting in the preparation of the research. Her favourite fighter Dan will be fighting Chris for the heavyweight title in March. Championships like this require adequate preparation. The poster and the promo video are in preparation. He's doing thorough preparation for the fight as he didn't perform well in his last match because he did no preparation. Chris didn't seem to have done much preparation for his last fight too. He almost lost the match so this time he's doing meticulous preparation for it including grappling, wresting, sambo and kickboxing as well as cardiovascular training. Sparring regularly is ideal preparation for a match. You cannot fight a high level fighter in a championship without proper preparation. My friend Ken is making preparations to go on a ski trip to Fukuoka. He's also making preparations to meet his favourite band X Japan in Nagasaki. He's preoccupied with these preparations. Preparations are being made for next month's ski festival in Kagoshima. The organisations and the institutions which organise the ski festival have announced that preparations for it are well under way.

replies.msg: 台長去過夏威夷？

今次去係住 旦過站嘅 hostel 佢其實同小倉站好近
可以行 行大概10分鐘到 我行得比較快 所以冇10分鐘
都唔難行 一路係條商店街直行就得 路痴都唔洗擔心 同埋沿途好多野睇 完全唔覺行左10分鐘

佢叫 Tanga Table hostel 佢同時係一間做晚市既餐廳
不過我住個兩晚都唔多人嚟食 係琴晚（星期4）有兩枱客 所以唔會好嘈 同埋日本人講野細聲 都唔係咩問題

好處: 地點好好 樓下就有 lawson 對面有muji 行去小倉城/紫川只需要5分鐘 週圍都好旺多餐廳 旦過市場 行1分鐘（開10點）
設施: 我對Hostel冇乜特別要求 不過係日本住左幾次 都幾好 呢間同樣都係 廁所好乾淨 沖涼都係 2間沖涼房 3間廁所。床都好舒服 係枕頭太淋唔好訓 要搵野墊高 好高私人度 可以簾

壞處:其實冇 隨左琴日有個印度佬嚟住傾電話傾到1點真係Cls勁想叫佢靜 不過間房冇乜人 訓多一晚就走 廢事理佢

Ps有好多人依家都租唔到樓會長住 hostel 今次有個日本伯伯好似係度長住 上次去台北都識左個台中男仔 係台北做野 但啲房太貴 佢要長住 hostel番工

總分9/10 會推薦比所有要係小倉過夜嘅人

我出發前一日24號晚先Book 2晚總數係$271hkd
真係好平 @booking.com
